# TutorLab

> [EN] TutorLab is an online platform for private tutors (репетиторы) to manage students, run live lessons with an interactive whiteboard and PDF slide sync, and list their profiles on a public tutor marketplace.

> [RU] TutorLab — онлайн-платформа для репетиторов: управление учениками, живые онлайн-уроки с интерактивной доской, PDF-презентации и маркетплейс репетиторов.

# license: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

## Pages

- [Tutor Marketplace](https://tutorlab.onrender.com/tutors): Browse and filter tutors by subject and hourly rate. Tutors list subjects they teach, pricing, and a bio.
- [About](https://tutorlab.onrender.com/about): Platform overview, feature list, tech stack, and contact info.
- [Privacy Policy](https://tutorlab.onrender.com/privacy): Data processing rules under Russian Federal Law No. 152-FZ. Data stored in Redis with 30-day TTL.
- [Terms of Use](https://tutorlab.onrender.com/terms): Service usage rules for tutors and students.

## Platform Details

- Backend: Spring Boot (Java 21), Redis (no relational DB)
- Frontend: React SPA, WebSocket via STOMP/SockJS, WebRTC audio/video
- Hosting: Render.com (US East)
- Language: Russian (ru-RU)
- Primary market: Russian-speaking tutors and students

## Contact

- Website: https://tutorlab.onrender.com
- Support: support@tutorlab.ru
